title: (REMASTER OUT) What's The Weather?
description: Whats The Weather is a mod that adds a TV that shows you the weather.
body:
Remaster out now! This mod will no longer recive any updates. [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/whats-the-weather-rebroadcasted)

What's The Weather is a mod that adds a TV block that displays the current weather on the screen. This is useful if you have a base underground, in a desert, etc and you are waiting for a certain weather, such as a thunderstorm.

Credits:

Tobin - Code and Development 
Simon - Art and Overall Polish
